top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(Amount * Price) 
FROM transactions_1k 
JOIN gasstations ON transactions_1k.GasStationID = gasstations.GasStationID 
WHERE gasstations.Country = 'Czech Republic';

SELECT AVG(t.Amount * t.Price) AS average_total_price
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE g.Country = 'Czech Republic';

SELECT AVG(Amount * Price) 
FROM transactions_1k 
JOIN gasstations ON transactions_1k.GasStationID = gasstations.GasStationID 
WHERE gasstations.Country = 'Czech Republic';

WITH czech_transactions AS (
    SELECT t.Amount * t.Price AS total_price
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
    WHERE g.Country = 'Czech Republic'
)
SELECT AVG(total_price) AS average_total_price
FROM czech_transactions;

SELECT AVG(t.Amount * t.Price) AS average_total_price
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE g.Country = 'Czech Republic';

SELECT AVG(Amount * Price) 
FROM transactions_1k 
JOIN gasstations ON transactions_1k.GasStationID = gasstations.GasStationID 
WHERE gasstations.Country = 'Czech Republic';

WITH czech_transactions AS (
    SELECT t.Amount * t.Price AS total_price
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
    WHERE g.Country = 'Czech Republic'
)
SELECT AVG(total_price) AS average_total_price
FROM czech_transactions;

WITH czech_transactions AS (
    SELECT t.TransactionID, t.Amount * t.Price AS total_price
    FROM transactions_1k t
    INNER JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
    WHERE g.Country = 'Czech Republic'
)
SELECT AVG(total_price) AS average_total_price
FROM czech_transactions;

SELECT AVG(Amount * Price) 
FROM transactions_1k 
JOIN gasstations ON transactions_1k.GasStationID = gasstations.GasStationID 
WHERE gasstations.Country = 'Czech Republic';
